data.title: Add integration tests: Figma JSON node mapping to spatial-layout.json
data.description:
## What
Extend tests/integration/test-figma-pullback-integration.sh with failing tests for the Figma JSON node tree to spatial-layout.json mapping. Tests MUST FAIL (RED) until figma-node-mapper.sh is implemented.

## testing_mode: RED
Adding new failing test functions to existing test file.

## Test Scenarios (Given/When/Then)

### JSON Node Mapping (FP-MAP-1 through FP-MAP-7)
- FP-MAP-1: Given tests/integration/fixtures/figma/figma-file-response.json, when figma-node-mapper.sh processes it, then outputs valid spatial-layout.json (parseable JSON with required schema fields)
- FP-MAP-2: Given a FRAME node in the fixture, when mapped, then output contains a section-type entry with id, name, and spatial_hint (x, y, width, height from absoluteBoundingBox)
- FP-MAP-3: Given a TEXT node in the fixture, when mapped, then output contains text field from characters property
- FP-MAP-4: Given a RECTANGLE node, when mapped, then output contains props with fills and strokes
- FP-MAP-5: Given a COMPONENT node, when mapped, then output contains component type with componentId preserved
- FP-MAP-6: Given an INSTANCE node, when mapped, then output contains instance type referencing the main component
- FP-MAP-7: Given a deeply nested structure, when figma-node-mapper.sh processes it with depth limit, then traversal terminates and outputs without OOM (depth_limit param respected)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] File contains test cases FP-MAP-1 through FP-MAP-7
  Verify: grep -q 'FP-MAP-1' tests/integration/test-figma-pullback-integration.sh && grep -q 'FP-MAP-7' tests/integration/test-figma-pullback-integration.sh
- [ ] Tests reference tests/integration/fixtures/figma/figma-file-response.json as input
  Verify: grep -q 'figma-file-response.json' tests/integration/test-figma-pullback-integration.sh
- [ ] Running test file exits non-zero (RED state maintained)
  Verify: bash tests/integration/test-figma-pullback-integration.sh; [ $? -ne 0 ]
